fix: normalize images to JPEG via canvas before API upload

Fixes "string did not match the expected pattern" error when uploading
multiple receipts. Re-encodes every image through canvas, guaranteeing

capping dimensions at 2048px to keep payload sizes manageable.

Fix/docs rs lib target (#9)

* fix: add lib.rs to fix docs.rs CI failure (v0.2.1)

docs.rs runs `cargo rustdoc --lib` internally, which fails when no
library target exists. This commit adds src/lib.rs to expose the
public API, making the crate usable both as a CLI and as a library.

Changes:
- Add src/lib.rs with crate-level doc comments and public module exports
- Update src/main.rs to import from `binsleuth::` (the lib crate)
- Add [lib] target and [package.metadata.docs.rs] to Cargo.toml
- Add examples/basic.rs demonstrating library usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: contract-formalizer must use _ prefix for non-OpenAPI placeholder files

When a proposal has no HTTP APIs, Contract Formalizer was creating a
placeholder file without _ prefix, causing Phase 2.6 validator to fail
by treating it as an invalid OpenAPI schema. Now explicitly requires
_no-http-api.json naming convention (validator already skips _ prefixed files).

commit.message:
Add Phase 5: testimonial carousel, gallery lightbox, and contact form

Build testimonials.js (261 lines): carousel with translateX slide
transitions, 5-second auto-rotation with pause-on-hover, prev/next
buttons, dot indicators, and touch/swipe support for mobile (50px
threshold with vertical scroll detection).

Build lightbox.js (351 lines): dynamically creates all lightbox DOM
elements (no static HTML needed), fullscreen overlay with fade
transition, prev/next navigation with wrap-around, image counter
("1 / 6"), keyboard support (arrows + Escape), focus trap, and
returns focus to trigger element on close. Handles both real images
and placeholder display.

Build contact.js (400 lines): validates name (2+ chars), phone
(Indian 10-digit starting 6-9 with +91/0 prefix stripping), email
(regex), and service (required select). Inline error display on blur
with clear-on-input. Builds WhatsApp URL with encoded form data,
opens in new tab, shows success message with mailto fallback. 10-second
rate limit with button countdown to prevent spam.

Update CSS: dynamic lightbox overlay/counter styles, form .error
red border, .form-success message, .btn-submit:disabled state.
Remove static lightbox HTML from index.html.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement expert roster and 40+ use case catalog

EXPERTS functions:
- get_expert(): Case-insensitive lookup by name or real_name
  - Supports both 'satya_nadella' and 'Satya Nadella' formats
  - Partial match fallback

- query_with_privacy_firewall(): Filter ChromaDB results by expert domain access
  - Enforces EXPERT_DATA_ACCESS privacy rules
  - Only returns items in expert's allowed domains

USE_CASES (40+ items):
- 🎯 CAREER (12): Interview prep, resume, salary, performance, pivots, learning
- 💛 RELATIONSHIPS (7): Conflict, conversations, romance, family, friendship
- 💪 HEALTH (6): Fitness, mental, sleep, nutrition, energy, tracking
- 💰 FINANCE (5): Budget, investment, compensation, purchases, goals
- 🧠 PERSONAL_GROWTH (6): Habits, goals, journaling, learning, identity, decisions
- 🎨 CREATIVITY (3): Ideas, writing, project planning
- 📚 MEMORIES (3): Memory capture, life review, people notes

Each use case includes:
- Category + domain for filtering
- Primary expert recommendation
- Keywords for semantic matching
- Question bank to guide conversation

Utility functions:
- get_use_case(id): Lookup single use case
- get_use_cases_by_category/domain(): Filter by category/domain
- find_use_cases_by_keywords(): Semantic keyword matching

commit.message:
fix: migrate.py — use exec_driver_sql to bypass SQLAlchemy :param scanning on JSON

Migration 035 failed on every deploy because SQLAlchemy's text() interprets
colon-number patterns in JSON string literals (e.g. "days_behind":296) as
named bind parameters. exec_driver_sql() bypasses SQLAlchemy's parameter
substitution layer and sends the SQL directly to psycopg2 — no false-positive
parameter detection.

This unblocks migration 035 and all subsequent migrations (036-039) which
were being skipped due to the sys.exit(1) from the first failure.

commit.message:
Classify ArithmeticDiv → §11.4.3.1 [skip ci]

The test exercises the binary `/` (slash) division operator on integral operands (`a / b`). §11.4.3.1 covers arithmetic expressions with unsigned and signed types, including the integer division rule (truncation toward zero), which is the most specific subclause for this operator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(patterns): add post-merge local sync to dev2merge and pr-codex-bot (#381) (#382)

After `gh pr merge` completes (remote-side squash-merge), the local main
branch was not synced with the remote. This caused local main to stay on
a stale commit, requiring manual `git fetch && git merge --ff-only`.

Changes:
- dev2merge: add Step 21 (Post-Merge Local Sync) with `git fetch origin
  && git checkout main && git merge origin/main --ff-only` and feature
  branch cleanup (local + remote)
- pr-codex-bot: replace `git checkout main && git pull origin main` with
  explicit `git fetch origin && git merge origin/main --ff-only` in all
  three merge steps (6a, 12, 12b), plus local branch cleanup
- Update SKILL.md done criteria and step descriptions for both patterns
- Sync workflow.toml steps with PATTERN.md changes

Closes #381

Remove duplicate iptv_canonical() — Yoast handles canonical via wpseo_canonical filter

The theme's own canonical function was outputting a second canonical tag
alongside Yoast's, and it also called get_permalink() which TranslatePress
corrupts. Yoast + our wpseo_canonical filter is the single source of truth.

Blow out star edge with glow bloom overlay

right at the surface edge so the hard sphere boundary disappears into
the bloom. Star looks too bright to see its edges clearly.
